description: A trigger declaring for: does not fire on a brief bounce into the target state that reverts before the hold elapses; it fires once a later occurrence holds continuously for the full declared duration, evaluated on monotonic time.

events.note: condition stops holding before the 30s for: elapses; pending fire discarded
on has held continuously since seq 3 (30000ms of monotonic time)

results.reason: hold broke at 5000ms elapsed, short of the 30000ms requirement
on held continuously from t=40000 to t=70000, satisfying for: 30
